assessment.note: Priya's response indicates a lack of significant impact from the team's recognition, suggesting a slight disengagement.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Current blockers check
new_queue.name: What blockers or dependencies are you currently facing that we haven't discussed?
new_queue.description: Invites a deeper look at any hidden obstacles affecting their work.

new_queue.label: Mentoring opportunities
new_queue.name: What kind of mentoring opportunities are you envisioning for yourself?
new_queue.description: Probes their interest and ideas around mentoring.
